title: RestApi
description: An API for fabric and forge mods development
body:
What is it about?

This is an API designed to streamline mod development for Fabric and Forge. This mod assists you in programming for multiple versions of Minecraft. In other words, there are functions/methods that will be available across all Minecraft versions, and with this API, you won't need to change the methods when switching versions.

Docs

https://rest-studio.com/pages/rest_api/docs.html

Discord

https://discord.gg/hMK5R8nqyJ
